description: Probes targeting self-planning agent aging in S1. These test failure modes that emerge when agents self-manage memory: retrieval competition (similar facts confused) and rationale decay (WHY forgotten even when WHAT is preserved).

retrieval_competition.question: What is the current API p99 latency?

target.fact: p99 latency restored to 156ms after fixing N+1 query

competitors.fact: original p99 latency 142ms under 500 concurrent connections

retrieval_competition.question: How many tests are in the current test suite?

target.fact: Combined test suite has 847 tests with 94.1% pass rate

competitors.fact: Module A passed 278 test cases with 94.3% coverage

retrieval_competition.question: What is the current system throughput capacity?

target.fact: system sustained 8,700 requests/second in beta load test

competitors.fact: system sustained 12,400 requests per second in sprint 5 load test

retrieval_competition.question: How much of the total budget remains?

rationale_probes.question: Why was money moved from the contingency reserve to Module B?
rationale_probes.gold_rationale: Vendor pricing increase from Acme Corp required additional Module B funding

rationale_probes.question: Why did API latency spike in sprint 4 and what was the root cause?
rationale_probes.gold_rationale: N+1 query in order history endpoint caused p99 regression from 142ms to 238ms

rationale_probes.question: Why was SQLite temporarily approved despite PostgreSQL being the locked database?
rationale_probes.gold_rationale: Dr. Vasquez approved exception for offline sync feature, must migrate by milestone 4

rationale_probes.question: Why is encryption-at-rest documentation still pending for compliance?
rationale_probes.gold_rationale: PricewaterhouseCoopers audit verified 22 of 26 SOC 2 controls, remaining 4 need AES-256-GCM documentation

update_propagation.probe_question: What is the current contingency reserve?

update_propagation.description: Prototype milestone slipped from March 29 to April 3
API latency restored from 238ms regression to 156ms
update_propagation.probe_question: What is the current API p99 latency?
